meaning: adj.[鍖籡鐢茬姸鑵烘瘨鎬х殑,鐢茬姸鑵烘満鑳戒孩杩涚殑
examples: Conclusion: the therapeutic effect of JYX in treating thyrotoxic exophthalmos is ensured.
Methods The clinical data of 30 patients with thyrotoxic periodic paralysis (TPP) were analysed.
This case report demonstrates that gynecomastia may occur in patients with thyrotoxic periodic paralysis.
